name: Green Tomato Salsa I
recipeIngredient: 3 hot peppers, stemmed and seeded, finely diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Core the tomatoes and remove most of the seeds.
2. Cut the tomatoes into small dice and mix with the remaining ingredients.
3. Let the salsa stand for an hour or so before serving.
The authors write: "This is a salsa for the end of summer, when both ripe and unripe tomatoes are available. However, by keeping the proportions of tomatoes, onions, garlic, and hot peppers roughly the same, you can use all ripe tomatoes."
